name: finch-hub
description: Finch hub — Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object relay for MCP appliances

scripts.deploy: node scripts/deploy-preflight.mjs production && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: node scripts/deploy-preflight.mjs staging && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:dev: node scripts/deploy-preflight.mjs dev && wrangler deploy --env dev
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env production && vitest run
